ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Continued To Feb-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross, via ZOOM, for Thomas Lucas, Executor.

Mr. Gross offers his reasons which have caused the delay in submitting a petition for filing but reports that it is ready and that he intends to forward it to his client for signature and that it should be ready to file by the end of this week. The court re-confirms with Mr. Gross that a petition for final distribution and an accounting are ready and only require his client's signature and that the petitions will be subsequently submitted to the court for filing.

The Status on Petition for Final Distribution is continued to Feb-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Continued To Dec-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross, via ZOOM, for Thomas Lucas, Personal Representative.

The court at the outset confirms with Mr. Gross that he has seen the Examiner's notes. Mr. Gross advises the court that he wishes to withdraw the Petition and that he will be filing a formal Probate petition as required and will likely include a first and final accounting.

The Petition to Terminate the Estate (No Assets) is off calendar. A Status for a Petition for Final Distribution is set for Nov-15-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Brandon Slykhous. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Continued To Sep-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Continued To Aug-09-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-19-2021 Continued To Jun-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross appeared by zoom for Thomas Lucas.

The Court questions why a petition regarding close of the estate has not been filed. Mr. Gross stated that when they opened this estate, they were under the assumption that there were multiple bank accounts, that they found that most of the accounts had designated Beneficiaries, that he has a petition to terminate the estate for lack of assets and that he can file it by next week. Status on close of estate is continued to June 16, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
